title: corylus sieboldiana
intro: Corylus sieboldiana, also known as Siebold's hazelnut or Korean hazelnut, is a species of deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Corylus sieboldiana include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as potentially lowering cholesterol levels and improving cognitive function. The herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, capsules, and topical creams for various health benefits.
